title: Reliance Digital is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Reliance Digital is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Reliance Digital in Jodhpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Reliance Digital:
Reliance Digital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Digital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
